title: Super Mario RPG Smithy Battle Theme on Mario Paint Composer
description:
This music is from the first battle with Smithy, the final boss in Super Mario RPG. Lots of strage factory-like noises in the background, and I tried to get most of them. I'm getting better with the video transitions. 
Thanks to vgmusic dot com for the midi (I use them a lot).
Thanks for BIGUNITZERO for uploading the actual song that I could compare the midi with.

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
